title: Register Response DTO
description: 200 body for POST /api/v1/auth/register. No access token is issued at registration time — the user must verify their email before they can log in. The workspace (tenant/team/project) is provisioned asynchronously; project_id is surfaced later via the device-flow (device_token_success_schema.json).

user.description: Registered user identity. email_verified will be false until the user completes the email verification flow.

requires_email_verification.description: Always true for self-service registration — the account is inactive until the verification link is clicked.

email_sent.description: Whether the verification email was successfully dispatched. False only on transient delivery failure; the user can resend via POST /api/v1/auth/resend-verification.
